lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.
The car is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage and corrosion, and the interior is heavily worn. It has major mechanical issues and requires extensive repairs to be functional.
This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and small dents. The interior shows moderate wear and some staining. All major mechanical systems are currently operational.

Get ready to be impressed by this absolutely pristine vehicle! It is in showroom condition, looking and driving exactly like it did the day it rolled off the lot. With its flawless exterior and an interior that still feels brand new, this car is a rare find for anyone seeking perfection. This is truly a top-tier example that has been meticulously cared for and is ready for its next owner to enjoy.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is, requiring significant mechanical and cosmetic attention. The engine struggles to maintain a consistent idle and the transmission exhibits heavy slipping, meaning it is not currently roadworthy for regular use. Additionally, the exterior shows considerable rust along the wheel arches and multiple dents, while the interior has sustained heavy wear including cracked plastics and torn seating. This car is recommended only for those looking for a major restoration project or a source of salvageable parts.

This vehicle is in rough condition and will require significant work or can serve as a parts car. The exterior has several large dents, heavy rusting on the door panels, and the paint is severely oxidized. Mechanically, the engine is currently running rough and the transmission experiences delayed shifting. The interior shows heavy wear, including torn seats and a broken dashboard. It is being sold as-is and is recommended for a buyer with mechanical expertise or looking for a restoration project.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier selection for the discerning driver. It exhibits consistent performance standards and a well-preserved interior, reflecting a history of responsible ownership. Mechanical integrity remains a hallmark of this unit, ensuring a reliable and sophisticated driving experience. We invite you to inspect this exceptional example of automotive engineering.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has clearly been well-loved over the years. It runs like a dream and is ready for its next big adventure with you! If you’re looking for a dependable car that still looks great on the road, this is definitely the one. Come take it for a spin—I just know you're going to love it!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54B32 inline-six engine with individual throttle bodies and a 8,000 RPM redline. Power is delivered through a precise Getrag six-speed manual gearbox to a variable M-differential lock. The chassis remains taut, benefiting from documented subframe reinforcement and a comprehensive VANOS system refresh to ensure optimal variable valve timing. While the finish shows light patina from spirited use, the mechanical vitals are robust, featuring upgraded bushings and a cooling system overhaul. A mechanically sound specimen that prioritizes tactile feedback and analog performance.
Used car. Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title. Mechanically sound.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and daily utility. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish, though closer inspection reveals a few minor stone chips on the front bumper consistent with careful highway use. Inside, the premium leather upholstery remains supple and free of tears, showing only light natural creasing on the driver’s side bolster. Every electronic component, from the intuitive infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control, functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is in excellent health; it has followed a rigorous service schedule at certified dealerships, with recent preventative maintenance including a full fluid flush and the installation of a new set of all-season tires. The engine delivers smooth, consistent power, and the transmission shifts are crisp and responsive. Garage-kept and smoke-free, this car offers a refined driving experience for a buyer looking for a reliable, high

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive excellence, this vehicle offers a harmonious blend of reliability and sophisticated performance. Meticulously maintained and showing clear pride of ownership, it represents an exceptional opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a dependable, high-quality pre-owned asset. Every component has been thoroughly vetted to ensure it meets our exacting standards for roadworthiness and long-term value, delivering a driving experience that remains consistently refined.

This exceptional vehicle offers a sophisticated balance of performance and reliability. Meticulously maintained and subjected to a rigorous multi-point inspection, it presents in commendable condition, ensuring both aesthetic appeal and mechanical integrity. A premier choice for the driver who demands quality without compromise.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and it’s looking for a brand new home! This car has been so reliable and is still in wonderful shape, perfect for someone who wants a smooth drive without any fuss. It’s been well-loved and is ready to hit the road with you today—come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Used car in good condition. Clean title. Maintenance up to date. Reliable daily driver.

This vehicle represents a fantastic balance of performance and meticulous upkeep. The exterior maintains a deep, glossy finish with only minor, unavoidable stone chips on the front fascia, while the body panels remain straight and free of major blemishes. Inside, the smoke-free cabin is exceptionally clean; the leather seating is supple with minimal bolster wear, and all electronic components—including the premium audio system and navigation—operate exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is turn-key. It has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer's schedule, with a recent oil change, fluid flush, and a comprehensive brake inspection just completed. The tires have ample tread remaining, and the transmission shifts smoothly through every gear. If you are looking for a reliable, well-documented vehicle that drives as well as it looks, this is a superb choice.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a balanced combination of performance and reliability. Fully inspected and prepared for immediate acquisition, this unit stands as a testament to responsible ownership and enduring quality.

Presented in commendable condition, this vehicle exemplifies mechanical excellence and aesthetic refinement. It has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and reliability. A distinguished choice for the professional seeking a sophisticated driving experience without compromise.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and it’s honestly been such a joy to own. It’s in really solid shape and has been super well-maintained—perfect for your daily commute or a fun weekend road trip! It runs great and looks fantastic, so I’m sure the next owner is going to absolutely love it. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 is a purist’s specification, powered by the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six featuring individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing. Power is delivered through a precise 6-speed manual transmission to a torque-sensing M Variable Differential Lock. The chassis has been maintained
Used vehicle. Good condition. Clean title. Well-maintained engine. Minor cosmetic wear. Reliable performance.

This vehicle has been exceptionally well-cared for and offers a reliable, premium driving experience. The exterior finish remains vibrant, showing only minor, age-appropriate road wear, while the interior is remarkably clean with firm seating and a smoke-free cabin. Mechanically, the car is sound; it has undergone regular oil changes and recent brake inspections, ensuring a smooth and responsive ride. All power features, including the climate control and infotainment system, are fully operational. This is a turnkey opportunity for a buyer seeking a dependable, high-quality vehicle without the new-car price tag. Complete service records are available upon request.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies reliable performance and sophisticated engineering. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal, offering a turnkey solution for the discerning driver. Experience the perfect synthesis of durability and comfort in a vehicle that remains in commendable condition throughout.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive excellence, this vehicle has been curated for the driver who demands a synthesis of mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. Meticulously maintained and rigorously inspected, it offers a commanding presence on the road paired with a documented history of consistent care. This offering represents a premier opportunity to acquire a high-caliber vehicle that balances sophisticated engineering with enduring value.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and it’s been such a joy to own. It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for all my daily trips. It still looks great parked in the driveway and runs like a dream! If you're looking for a dependable car that’s been well-loved and is ready for its next adventure, this is the one for you. Come check it out and take it for a spin—you’ll love how it feels on the road!

This E46-generation M3 is a mechanically sound example featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six engine, complete with its factory individual throttle bodies and a high-revving 8,000 RPM redline. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise Getrag six-speed manual transmission and a variable M differential lock, ensuring optimal torque distribution. Proactive maintenance includes a comprehensive VANOS system overhaul and rear subframe reinforcement to mitigate known chassis fatigue. The suspension geometry remains tight, utilizing MacPherson struts and a multi-link rear setup with refreshed bushings for sharpened turn-in. While exhibiting minor aesthetic patina consistent with a well-loved driver’s car, its performance envelope remains intact, offering a linear power band and communicative steering feedback.
Used car in good condition. Well-maintained engine. Clean interior. Reliable daily driver.

This vehicle is a prime example of a well-loved driver’s car, striking the perfect balance between performance and daily utility. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, though it shows minor, honest signs of use consistent with careful ownership. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean; the leather seats are supple with minimal creasing, and all electronics—including the premium sound system and climate control—function flawlessly. Mechanically, it is robust. It has been serviced regularly, with a recent oil change and a fresh set of tires. The engine pulls smoothly, and the transmission shifts with precision. While there are a few light stone chips on the hood, it remains a reliable, eye-catching vehicle ready for its next owner.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical reliability and aesthetic integrity. This unit has undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and safety. With a documented service history and a well-preserved interior, it represents a premier acquisition for the discerning motorist seeking a balance of value and longevity. Experience the assurance of quality engineering in a package that commands respect on the road.
